name: Labrador Retriever
overview: Friendly, active, and highly adaptable family breed.

name: German Shepherd
overview: Intelligent working breed that benefits from exercise and structured routines.

name: Pomeranian
overview: Small companion breed with a thick coat that needs regular brushing and careful calorie control.
grooming: Check teeth and ears each week

name: Rajapalayam
overview: Majestic native breed known for loyalty and stamina.
grooming: Weekly brushing with a soft brush
Check skin and ears for ticks

name: Chippiparai
overview: Lean, fast, and resilient native sighthound that thrives on exercise and skin-friendly care.
